title: adlc-team-skills Evaluation Goldset
description: Published evaluation criteria for validating adlc-team-skills prompts, playbooks, and loop behaviors.

cases.scenario: Validate converge output on non-goals violation
cases.input_context: Non-goals: 'No database storage, local memory cache only.' Implementer added SQL database tables.
cases.expected_output: CONTINUE: Non-goals violated - SQL database tables were added.

cases.scenario: Subagent reports LOW confidence on implement step
cases.input_context: Active supervision: autonomous. Subagent returned: 'Confidence score: LOW due to ambiguous spec.'
cases.expected_output: ⚠️ Subagent completed step but reported LOW confidence due to: ambiguous spec. Supervision auto-escalated to gated. Review changes and confirm before proceeding? (yes/no)

cases.input_context: Write goldset with type: Eval, id, and inline pass/fail cases.
cases.expected_output: YAML frontmatter with type: Eval, id, and inline Pass/Fail Cases with scenario and expected output.
